_readme: Edit this file to customise camera detection. Filename patterns match the START of the filename. Longer patterns take priority over shorter ones. Restart Resolve after editing.
_fujifilm_note: Fujifilm detection uses binary search and should work automatically. If your Fujifilm clips land in Unknown, please send a sample clip to support@drrave.com and we will add detection in v1.1
_dji_note: DJI files embed no camera model in the video file. Detection uses filename prefix DJI_ only. To get model-level bins (Mavic 3, Mini 4 Pro etc), add your own filename patterns below.
_android_note: Android phones are auto-detected via manufacturer tags. Add custom patterns here for phones not automatically detected.
_custom_note: Add your own filename patterns below. Example: "MYFILE_": "My Camera Name"
